title: ruellia dissidens var. subglabra
intro: Ruellia dissidens var. subglabra is a plant species of the genus Ruellia, native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. It is a perennial herb that belongs to the family Acanthaceae. The medicinal properties of Ruellia dissidens var. subglabra include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can help to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues, while also promoting relaxation and reducing stress levels.
